notes:
# BondoMod 0.1.45

- Added Spotify Overlay with album art and live song progress.
- Added a transparent Rocket League session timer and automatic overlay restore.
- Added a new controller display style and a dedicated controller deadzone plugin.
- Added a searchable item catalog with category filters and multi-item selection.
- Fixed Platform Display startup, update launch reliability, FPS stability, and Name Spoofer handling.
